languages.original_text: "I... am not certain that anyone here can offer any comment on your — undoubtedly sage — statement."

languages.text: "Я... не уверен, что кто-то из присутствующих сможет хоть как-то прокомментировать ваше, несомненно, мудрое высказывание".
"I... am not certain that anyone here can offer any comment on your — undoubtedly sage — statement."
languages.original_text: "Я... не уверен, что кто-то из присутствующих сможет хоть как-то прокомментировать ваше, несомненно, мудрое высказывание".

traits.locale_text: "I... am not certain that anyone here can offer any comment on your — undoubtedly sage — statement."
"I... am not certain that anyone here can offer any comment on your — undoubtedly sage — statement."
"I... am not certain that anyone here can offer any comment on your — undoubtedly sage — statement."

languages.text: 「私は…この場で、あなたの…きっと賢明な…発言について、何かコメントできる人がいるとは確信していません」
languages.original_text: "I... am not certain that anyone here can offer any comment on your — undoubtedly sage — statement."

traits.locale_text: 「私は…この場で、あなたの…きっと賢明な…発言について、何かコメントできる人がいるとは確信していません。」

languages.text: « Je... ne suis pas certain que qui que ce soit parmi nous soit capable de commenter votre déclaration... qui est sans aucun doute très sage. »
languages.original_text: "I... am not certain that anyone here can offer any comment on your — undoubtedly sage — statement."

traits.locale_text: « Je... ne suis pas certain que qui que ce soit parmi nous soit capable de commenter votre déclaration... qui est sans aucun doute très sage. »

languages.text: "Ich ... bin mir nicht sicher, ob alle hier Eure – zweifellos weise – Aussage kommentieren können."
languages.original_text: "I... am not certain that anyone here can offer any comment on your — undoubtedly sage — statement."

traits.locale_text: "Ich ... bin mir nicht sicher, ob alle hier Eure – zweifellos weise – Aussage kommentieren können."

languages.text: "Ben... Buradaki kimsenin sizin şüphesiz bilgece olan ifadeniz üzerine herhangi bir yorum yapabileceğinden emin değilim."
languages.original_text: "I... am not certain that anyone here can offer any comment on your — undoubtedly sage — statement."

traits.locale_text: "Ben... Buradaki kimsenin sizin şüphesiz bilgece olan ifadeniz üzerine herhangi bir yorum yapabileceğinden emin değilim."

languages.text: «Pues... no creo que ninguno de los presentes pueda cambiarle ni una coma a su indudablemente sabia parrafada».
languages.original_text: "I... am not certain that anyone here can offer any comment on your — undoubtedly sage — statement."

traits.locale_text: «Pues... no creo que ninguno de los presentes pueda cambiarle ni una coma a su indudablemente sabia parrafada».

languages.text: “我……不确定在座有谁能对你这番——无疑是睿智的——论断发表任何评论。”
languages.original_text: "I... am not certain that anyone here can offer any comment on your — undoubtedly sage — statement."

traits.locale_text: “我……不确定在座有谁能对你这番——无疑是睿智的——论断发表任何评论。”
